title: The Prince That Was Promised Explained #got #shorts
description: A prophecy whispered across centuries speaks of a hero born to bring balance to the world. But who is the Prince That Was Promised—and what does it truly mean? #Prophecy #GameOfThrones #Shorts

scenes.narration: For centuries, a prophecy echoed through Westeros—a promise of a prince who would save the world from darkness.
scenes.image_prompt: ancient scroll glowing with fire symbols, mystical prophecy atmosphere, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: It spoke of a hero born amidst salt and smoke, destined to stand against the coming night.
scenes.image_prompt: baby surrounded by smoke and ocean waves, symbolic imagery, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: This figure would wield Lightbringer, a weapon of fire, to bring balance between life and death.
scenes.image_prompt: flaming sword glowing in darkness, cutting through icy mist, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Over time, many believed the prophecy pointed to different people, each shaped by their own understanding.
scenes.image_prompt: multiple silhouettes of characters overlapping with fire and shadow, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Some believed it was a Targaryen, born from a bloodline tied to dragons and ancient fire.
scenes.image_prompt: Targaryen figure surrounded by dragons and flame, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Others saw it as a recurring prophecy, one that could be fulfilled again when the world needed it most.
scenes.image_prompt: cycle of time symbol with repeated hero silhouettes, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The prophecy was never clear—only fragments remained, shaped by time, translation, and belief.
scenes.image_prompt: ancient texts breaking apart into glowing fragments, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What remained constant was the warning—that darkness would return, and someone would have to stand against it.
scenes.image_prompt: shadow of White Walkers advancing while a single figure stands in firelight, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But the prophecy never promised victory—only that the fight would come again.
scenes.image_prompt: battle of fire and ice frozen in time, uncertain outcome, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because the Prince That Was Promised may not be a single person—but a role the world demands again and again.
scenes.image_prompt: multiple figures merging into one glowing silhouette, mythic ending, vertical 1080x1920
